title: Is it possible to copy links to a list of tasks?
excerpt:

posts.author: GeorgeMoulos (George Moulos)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hiya folks, I’m new to Monday but have used Asana for a few years now so am familiar with a lot of the basics.

I tend to work between Google Sheets and a project management tool for tracking tasks etc so I often like to include a link to the Asana task in the sheet. With Asana, it’s possible to select a list of tasks, “copy links to tasks”, and paste them into a sheet. Every link takes its own line so, when you’ve matched the order of tasks, it saves a lot of time that you’d otherwise have to spend manually copying the link to each task.

Is this possible in Monday? And, if not, would it be possible to add?

Many thanks,
George
